race.comment: The flying MOULIN MISS (6) has impressed at both runs this prep. Bolted in first-up in midweek company at then stepped up to Saturday grade and just failed in an attempt to lead all the way over this distance at Eagle Farm. Nicely in with the claim and will give a great sight. CINDERSEA (3) last appeared eight weeks ago when she led all the way and defied the talented Savagery Vibe over 1200m at Doomben. Good fresh performer who will be in this for a long way. SUNRISE (7) was outclassed first-up in the Hawkesbury Gold Rush. The winner of three from four at this distance. Big chance with blinkers on for the first time. OVERFULL (11) is trialling well and can play a role first-up. BRAVEHEART (10) is eligible for easier races but is going extra well this prep and has the advantage of the inside alley.
